title: Statewide AI Use Policy
content_summary: Establishes requirements for AI impact assessments, bias testing, and human oversight for all state agency AI deployments. Requires agencies to maintain an AI inventory and conduct annual reviews.

title: IT Procurement Guidelines for AI Services
content_summary: Vendors providing AI services must submit attestation forms per EO N-5-26. Procurement officers must verify compliance with SB 53 safety requirements before contract execution.

title: Cross-Agency Data Sharing Framework
content_summary: Agencies may share de-identified data for research and operational improvement. Requires data sharing agreements, CCPA compliance, and quarterly audit reporting.

title: AI-Assisted HR Decision Making Guidelines
content_summary: AI tools used in hiring, promotion, or performance evaluation must undergo bias audits. Human review required for all adverse actions informed by AI recommendations.
